messages.content: You convert informal meeting notes into structured JSON with the schema {"title":"string","action_items":["string"],"owners":["string"],"due_dates":["string"]}. The arrays action_items, owners, and due_dates must be the same length. Due dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format or "" if unknown. Return only JSON.
Project kickoff meeting. Alex will create the project plan by 2026-04-01.
{"title":"Project kickoff meeting","action_items":["Create the project plan"],"owners":["Alex"],"due_dates":["2026-04-01"]}
